evals.prompt: Update Chinese UI copy in frontend/src/views/ticket/detail.vue and ensure no mojibake is introduced. Report encoding validation results.
evals.expected_output: Copy update is complete, encoding check is executed, and UTF-8 validation result is clearly reported.

evals.prompt: A SQL file generated from Windows PowerShell shows garbled Chinese comments. Use the auto-fix script with backup, then verify encoding.
evals.expected_output: Auto-fix runs with backup, file is normalized to UTF-8, and validation report is provided.

evals.prompt: Run a repository-wide check on tracked text files and block delivery if suspicious mojibake patterns are found.
evals.expected_output: Tracked files are scanned, FAIL/WARN findings are listed, and strict-mode decision is enforced.
